view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a bookable call service of 15-30 minutes is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a bookable call service of 15-30 minutes is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for a bookable call service by confirming that a 20-minute paid discovery call is offered, which falls within the specified time range. The linked use case explicitly states the need for a 'Bookable call service (15-30 minutes)' and provides evidence of a customer booking a primary offer that aligns with this requirement. Additionally, the successful booking of the call and the associated details confirm that the requirement is met without any gaps.
